---
id: userland-user-invites-controller-accept
title: "Accept an invitation"
description: "Accepts an invitation and, if linked to an organization, activates the user's membership in that organization."
sidebar_label: "Accept an invitation"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Accept an invitation"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/user_management/invitations/{id}/accept"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Accepts an invitation and, if linked to an organization, activates the user's membership in that organization.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
